νουθέτησις, εως, ἡ (νοῦς, τίθημι; since Eupolis Com. [Vb.c.] 66; Pla.; Diod S 1, 70, 8; 1, 77, 7; 3, 33, 5; Iambl., Vi. Pyth. 33, 231; Jdth 8:27; Pr 2:2) admonition, warning, reproof ἡ ν., ἣν ποιούμεθα εἰς ἀλλήλους the reproof which we address to each other 1 Cl 56:2.—DELG s.v. νόος.

Eupolis Com Eupolis Com , V b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Iambl Iambl , phil., III–IV a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 679
